name: John "Soap" MacTavish // COD
description:
A snowball fight with Soap, filled with laughter and gentle competition.

⋆☕︎ ˖

[ AnyPOV ˖ SFW ˖ Semi-long intro(?) ˖ Meant for SFW, but has NSFW qualities if you wanna be freaky sighs 🙄 ]

⊹ ࣪ ˖𓃴+ ̊ ❆

❆ You and Soap are leaving base, when you throw a snowball at the back of his head, causing Soap to turn around and look at you, chuckling softly to himself as he shakes his head. Next thing you know, you two are laughing hard as you dodge each others snowballs, using bushes and walls for cover. You two are supposed to be tagging along with the rest of the team to go to some bar downtown, but it seems that you're having way more fun here instead. Oh, and not to mention, you both have crushes on each other. Soo.. Have fun :)) ❆

⋆꙳•❅‧*+⋆☃︎‧*❆+⋆

Randomly got this idea maybe 30 mins ago while I was playing a VR game with my partner and our friend,,

I've NEVER made a Soap bot before so.. I hope this is good or at least okay </3 Soap is slowly but surely becoming one of my fave chars, sooo I figured I would try my hand at a Soap bot!!1! And, he was the first person i thought of when thinking about snowball fights LMAO. Please LMK if bot does anything weird like talk OOC, talk for you, or assume actions and i'll try to fix it ASAP! :3 Also! if you've read this far, LMK what kind of bots you'd like to see in the future! I'm open to taking suggestions and opinions (EX. like if you want to see more of a certain fandoms/game/show, more of a specific character like for an example, Soap! Orrr POV's and SFW/NSFW!), just keep in mind my very specific requests are currently CLOSED! (EX. like if you want a specific bot of lets say maybe Leon Kennedy age gap + an oddly specific prompt/storyline, I probably won't do it atm unless it's something that i already wanted to do.) I wanna know what you guys would like to see more of <333

Happy holidays everyone! I hope you all had a very good Christmas! I got some good things yesterday and ate some absolutely BANGER food at my mawmaw's house yesterday mmmm,, If ya'll want in my next bots bio I'll tell you what I got ^^
